title: Mandala's GUI - ProjectMMO Compat
description: An addition to the "Mandala's GUI - Dark mode" texture pack that adds textures to the skill button and skill list from ProjectMMO.
body:
An addition to the "Mandala's GUI - Dark mode" texture pack that adds textures to the skill button and skill list from ProjectMMO.



![Skill Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a47a8695475590b832b294cb41506090a7fcaa0.jpeg)
![Golden Theme](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afd302bf6004732f49e84854c4985334d4b9e6b7.jpeg)
![Consistent Theme](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a8b7e43f2c1acbd15a6fe14454dad5528e53184.jpeg)
![Golden Theme (Flat)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0670698bff5b69eb02b4008f7656b156208bb312.jpeg)

Credits/Dependencies:

[Mandala's GUI - Dark Mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mandalas-gui-dark-mode)

[ProjectMMO](https://modrinth.com/mod/project-mmo)
